title: SQL: cast interval to time results in zero time
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, duration INTERVAL NOT NULL);
SELECT duration, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM duration) AS hour_value, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM duration) AS minute_value FROM test_intervals;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM duration) AS hour_value, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM duration) AS minute_value FROM test_intervals WHERE duration IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM INTERVAL '120' SECOND) AS hour_value, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM INTERVAL '120' SECOND) AS minute_value FROM test_intervals;
key_bug_features: casting interval to time returns zero time
